name: get_all_products
description: Get all products from the furniture catalog.

name: get_products_per_category
description: Get products belonging to a specific category.

category.description: The category of furniture (e.g., Living Room, Bedroom, etc.)

name: get_products_within_price_range
description: Get products within a specified price range.

name: create_order
description: Place an order for a specific product.

product_id.description: The ID of the product to order

name: get_order
description: Retrieve details of a specific order by its order ID.

order_id.description: The ID of the order to retrieve.

name: get_orders
description: Retrieve a list of all orders.
